narrative:
Strongsville-04-D (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,168 registered voters, with 59.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.6%, a modest Republican lean of 5.7 percentage points.
